steps.t: Hedra has asked you to free Corsair captives at the wreck of the Kêl Tezhor, if there are any. You should first find them.
You have found a Corsair captive at the wreck of the Kêl Tezhor. You should talk to him.
You have found the last surviving Corsair captive at the wreck of the Kêl Tezhor. You should free Udnerth from his bindings.
You've done what you set out to do. You should talk to Udnerth outside of the wreck of the Kêl Tezhor.
